title: CobbleHispano
description: Modpack based on Cobblemon that includes most of its addons along with gameplay, construction, and exploration improvements for a richer and more polished experience on the CobbleHispano server.
body:
# 🎮 CobbleHispano – Official Server Modpack

**CobbleHispano** is the official modpack for the Spanish-speaking server **CobbleHispano**, built on *Cobblemon* and expanded with most of its official add-ons, along with exclusive content developed by our team. It is designed to offer a completely Spanish Pokémon experience, with a competitive focus, structured progression, and an active community.

## 📌 Main features

✅ **Based on Cobblemon** – Pokémon natively integrated into the world of Minecraft.

📈 **Trainer progression system** – Custom NPCs that you must find in the world, along with their gym.

⭐ **Legendaries with unique mechanics** – Special methods for obtaining legendary Pokémon, designed for official events and challenges.

🏞️ **Improved exploration** – New biomes, structures, and settings designed to make the world feel more alive.

⚙️ **Optimization included** – Performance mods to ensure a smooth experience, even in multiplayer.

🎮 **Ready to play** – Install and jump right into the server with no additional configuration.

🛠️ **Exclusive server content** – **Custom Level Cap** system using our own mod and **unique trainers** created by the CobbleHispano team.

🐙 Fakemons implemented thanks to **Extra Eeveelutions and CobblemonAFP**

> 💬 **Note:** You can play this modpack in singleplayer, but many of the special features (level cap, events, story trainers, and official progression) are designed to be enjoyed on the **CobbleHispano** server.
